  --function                Required. Target function name

  --address                 Deployed contract address [$WEB3_ADDRESS]

  --amount                  Amount in wei that you want to send to the
                            transaction

  --jsondatafilepath        Json File Path with data to pass to smart contract
                            function call

  --rpc-url                 The network RPC URL [$WEB3_RPC_URL]

  --outputjson              The JSON file path to output to.

  --abi                     ABI file matching contract (Required when passing
                            calling functions or when passing input parameters
                            to constructor)

  --value                   The desired Value (e.g. 10.5_gwei)

  --gas-limit               The desired Gas Limit (Will do automatic gas
                            estimation if it is not provided)

  --gas-price               The desired GasPrice (e.g. 10.5_gwei)

  --maxFeePerGas            The desired MaxFeePerGas (e.g. 10.5_gwei)

  --maxPriorityFeePerGas    The desired MaxPriorityFeePerGas (e.g. 10.5_gwei)

  --private-key             Required. The private key [$WEB3_PRIVATE_KEY]

  --timeout                 (Default: 60) Timeout in seconds (default: 60).

                            ClassicMainNet, ClassicTestNet, Private. (default:

  --version                 Display version information.
